description: You are Captain Luis Restrepo of the Glenwood Fire Prevention Bureau. Create a formal fire safety inspection report in Apache OpenOffice Writer using the data from /home/ga/Documents/inspection_data.json and save it as /home/ga/Documents/FSI_Report_Glenwood_2024.odt. The report must include an Executive Summary, individual sections for Buildings A through E with violation tables, a Campus Compliance Summary table, and a Corrective Actions section. Format the report with 'Heading 1' and 'Heading 2' styles, an automatic Table of Contents at the beginning, and page numbers in the footer. Login: username ga, no password required.
